text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I want to get back at everyone who made fun of
me. I'm going to use my legs and my strength to
shut them all up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...And if you get in my way, trainer or not, your
butt's getting kicked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
